From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Honor of the Sultanate of Brunei

| Family Order of Laila Utama | |
| --- | --- |
| Awarded by the [Sultan of Brunei](/wiki/Sultan_of_Brunei "Sultan of Brunei") | |
| Type | [Order of chivalry](/wiki/Order_of_chivalry "Order of chivalry") |
| Established | 1954 |
| Country | [Brunei](/wiki/Brunei "Brunei") |
| Eligibility | Members of the [Brunei royal family](/wiki/House_of_Bolkiah "House of Bolkiah"), foreign dignitaries, and other distinguished individuals |
| Status | Currently constituted |
| Sovereign | [Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Hassanal_Bolkiah "Hassanal Bolkiah") |
| Precedence | |
| Next (higher) | [Royal Family Order of the Crown of Brunei](/wiki/Royal_Family_Order_of_the_Crown_of_Brunei "Royal Family Order of the Crown of Brunei") |
| Next (lower) | [Family Order of Seri Utama](/wiki/Family_Order_of_Seri_Utama "Family Order of Seri Utama") |
|  | |

**The Most Esteemed Family Order of Laila Utama**[[1]](#cite_note-1) ([Malay](/wiki/Malay_language "Malay language"): *Darjah Kerabat Laila Utama Yang Amat Dihormati*) is the highest [order](/wiki/Order_(decoration) "Order (decoration)") of [Brunei](/wiki/Brunei "Brunei"). It was established on 1 March 1954 by [Sultan Omar Ali Saifuddien III](/wiki/Sultan_Omar_Ali_Saifuddien_III "Sultan Omar Ali Saifuddien III").[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2) The order carries the [post-nominal letters](/wiki/Post-nominal_letters "Post-nominal letters") "DK I" as well as the [title](/wiki/Malay_styles_and_titles "Malay styles and titles") "Dato Laila Utama".

## Description

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Family_Order_of_Laila_Utama&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Description")]

Before 1975, Sultan Omar Ali Saifuddien III painted [bust](/wiki/Bust_(sculpture) "Bust (sculpture)") was the centerpiece of the order's design. Then a [star](/wiki/Star "Star") and [crescent moon](/wiki/Crescent_Moon_of_Islam "Crescent Moon of Islam") took the place of the bust. All of the emblems are made of [gold](/wiki/Gold "Gold") or [silver](/wiki/Silver "Silver") with [enamel](/wiki/Enamel_paint "Enamel paint") accents. The post-nominal letters "DK I" are associated with the order. The right to use the title "Dato Laila Utama" is included in the order.[[3]](#cite_note-:4-3)

## Recipients

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Family_Order_of_Laila_Utama&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Recipients")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | This list is [incomplete](/wiki/Wikipedia:WikiProject_Lists#Incomplete_lists "Wikipedia:WikiProject Lists"); you can help by [adding missing items](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Family_Order_of_Laila_Utama&action=edit). *(December 2022)* |

Awards were given to members of the [Royal Family](/wiki/House_of_Bolkiah "House of Bolkiah"), princes from other countries, chiefs of state, and other deserving individuals.[[3]](#cite_note-:4-3)

### Ordinary recipients

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Family_Order_of_Laila_Utama&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Ordinary recipients")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/09/Sir_Anthony_Abell_%281950s%29.jpg/250px-Sir_Anthony_Abell_%281950s%29.jpg)](/wiki/File:Sir_Anthony_Abell_(1950s).jpg)

Abell wearing his sash in the 1950s

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c4/Wedding_Procession_of_Abdul_Mateen_and_Anisha_Rosnah_-_53463099081.jpg/250px-Wedding_Procession_of_Abdul_Mateen_and_Anisha_Rosnah_-_53463099081.jpg)](/wiki/File:Wedding_Procession_of_Abdul_Mateen_and_Anisha_Rosnah_-_53463099081.jpg)

Crown Princess Sarah wearing her sash in 2024

Pengiran Bahrin wearing his sash in 2024

### Honorary recipients

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Family_Order_of_Laila_Utama&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Honorary recipients")]

* 1957: [Tuanku Abdul Rahman](/wiki/Abdul_Rahman_of_Negeri_Sembilan "Abdul Rahman of Negeri Sembilan"), [Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong_of_Malaysia "Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia")
* 1958: [Hisamuddin](/wiki/Hisamuddin_of_Selangor "Hisamuddin of Selangor"), [Sultan of Selangor](/wiki/Sultan_of_Selangor "Sultan of Selangor")[[28]](#cite_note-:5-28)
* 1958: [Abu Bakar](/wiki/Abu_Bakar_of_Pahang "Abu Bakar of Pahang"), [Sultan of Pahang](/wiki/Sultan_of_Pahang "Sultan of Pahang")[[28]](#cite_note-:5-28)
* 1958: [Putra](/wiki/Putra_of_Perlis "Putra of Perlis"), [Raja of Perlis](/wiki/House_of_Jamalullail_(Perlis) "House of Jamalullail (Perlis)")[[28]](#cite_note-:5-28)
* 1958: [Ibrahim](/wiki/Ibrahim_of_Kelantan "Ibrahim of Kelantan"), [Sultan of Kelantan](/wiki/Sultan_of_Kelantan "Sultan of Kelantan")[[28]](#cite_note-:5-28)
* 1958: [Ismail](/wiki/Ismail_of_Johor "Ismail of Johor"), [Crown Prince of Johor](/wiki/Sultan_of_Johor "Sultan of Johor")[[28]](#cite_note-:5-28)
* 1959: [Tunku Abdul Rahman](/wiki/Tunku_Abdul_Rahman "Tunku Abdul Rahman"), [Prime Minister of Malaysia](/wiki/Prime_Minister_of_Malaysia "Prime Minister of Malaysia")
* 1960: [Yusof Ishak](/wiki/Yusof_Ishak "Yusof Ishak"), Yang di-Pertuan Negara of Singapore (later President)
* 1961: [Yahya Petra](/wiki/Yahya_Petra_of_Kelantan "Yahya Petra of Kelantan"), [Sultan of Kelantan](/wiki/Sultan_of_Kelantan "Sultan of Kelantan")
* 1968: [Tuanku Ja’afar](/wiki/Ja%27afar_of_Negeri_Sembilan "Ja'afar of Negeri Sembilan"), [Yang di-Pertuan Besar of Negeri Sembilan](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Besar_of_Negeri_Sembilan "Yang di-Pertuan Besar of Negeri Sembilan")
* 1972: [Elizabeth II](/wiki/Elizabeth_II "Elizabeth II"), [Queen of the United Kingdom](/wiki/Monarchy_of_the_United_Kingdom "Monarchy of the United Kingdom")
* 1972: [Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh](/wiki/Prince_Philip,_Duke_of_Edinburgh "Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh")
* 1972: [Peter Gautrey](/wiki/Peter_Gautrey "Peter Gautrey"), [British High Commissioner to Brunei](/wiki/List_of_High_Commissioners_of_the_United_Kingdom_to_Brunei "List of High Commissioners of the United Kingdom to Brunei")[[29]](#cite_note-:03-29)
* 1972: [Iskandar](/wiki/Iskandar_of_Johor "Iskandar of Johor"), [Sultan of Johor](/wiki/Sultan_of_Johor "Sultan of Johor")
* 1980: [Ahmad Shah](/wiki/Ahmad_Shah_of_Pahang "Ahmad Shah of Pahang"), [Sultan of Pahang](/wiki/Sultan_of_Pahang "Sultan of Pahang")
* 1984: [Noor](/wiki/Queen_Noor_of_Jordan "Queen Noor of Jordan"), Queen Consort of Jordan
* 1987: [Zanariah](/wiki/Tunku_Puan_Zanariah "Tunku Puan Zanariah"), [Raja Permaisuri Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Raja_Permaisuri_Agong "Raja Permaisuri Agong")
* 1988: [Fidel V. Ramos](/wiki/Fidel_V._Ramos "Fidel V. Ramos"), [President of the Philippines](/wiki/President_of_the_Philippines "President of the Philippines")
* 1988: [Suharto](/wiki/Suharto "Suharto"), [President of Indonesia](/wiki/President_of_Indonesia "President of Indonesia")
* 1988: [Siti Hartinah](/wiki/Siti_Hartinah "Siti Hartinah"), [First Lady of Indonesia](/wiki/First_Lady_of_Indonesia "First Lady of Indonesia")
* 1990: [Sirikit](/wiki/Sirikit "Sirikit"), [Queen Consort of Thailand](/wiki/List_of_Thai_consorts "List of Thai consorts")
* 1990: [Sirindhorn](/wiki/Sirindhorn "Sirindhorn"), Princess of Thailand
* 1990: [Lee Kuan Yew](/wiki/Lee_Kuan_Yew "Lee Kuan Yew"), [Prime Minister of Singapore](/wiki/Prime_Minister_of_Singapore "Prime Minister of Singapore")[[30]](#cite_note-30)
* 1990: [Sir Ti-Liang Yang](/wiki/Yang_Ti-liang "Yang Ti-liang"), [Chief Justice of the Supreme Court of Hong Kong](/wiki/Chief_Justice_of_the_Supreme_Court_of_Hong_Kong "Chief Justice of the Supreme Court of Hong Kong")[[31]](#cite_note-:08-31)
* 1996: [Charles III](/wiki/Charles_III "Charles III"), [King of the United Kingdom](/wiki/Monarchy_of_the_United_Kingdom "Monarchy of the United Kingdom"), as Prince of Wales[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]
* 1997: [Tun Dr. Mahathir Mohamad](/wiki/Mahathir_Mohamad "Mahathir Mohamad"), [Prime Minister of Malaysia](/wiki/Prime_Minister_of_Malaysia "Prime Minister of Malaysia")
* 2000: [Princess Basma bint Talal](/wiki/Princess_Basma_bint_Talal "Princess Basma bint Talal") of Jordan[[32]](#cite_note-:39-32)
* 2001: [Gloria Macapagal Arroyo](/wiki/Gloria_Macapagal_Arroyo "Gloria Macapagal Arroyo"), [President of the Philippines](/wiki/President_of_the_Philippines "President of the Philippines")[[33]](#cite_note-33)[[34]](#cite_note-34)
* 2001: Prince [Al Waleed bin Talal Al Saud](/wiki/Al_Waleed_bin_Talal_Al_Saud "Al Waleed bin Talal Al Saud")[[35]](#cite_note-35)
* 2004: [Queen Silvia of Sweden](/wiki/Queen_Silvia_of_Sweden "Queen Silvia of Sweden"), Queen Consort of Sweden[[36]](#cite_note-36)
* 2004: [Leonid Kuchma](/wiki/Leonid_Kuchma "Leonid Kuchma"), [President of Ukraine](/wiki/President_of_Ukraine "President of Ukraine")
* 2006: [Susilo Bambang Yudhoyono](/wiki/Susilo_Bambang_Yudhoyono "Susilo Bambang Yudhoyono"), [President of Indonesia](/wiki/President_of_Indonesia "President of Indonesia")[[37]](#cite_note-37)
* 2010: [Tun Abdullah Ahmad Badawi](/wiki/Abdullah_Ahmad_Badawi "Abdullah Ahmad Badawi"), [Prime Minister of Malaysia](/wiki/Prime_Minister_of_Malaysia "Prime Minister of Malaysia")[[38]](#cite_note-38)
* 2010: [Dato' Sri Haji Mohammad Najib Razak](/wiki/Najib_Razak "Najib Razak"), [Prime Minister of Malaysia](/wiki/Prime_Minister_of_Malaysia "Prime Minister of Malaysia")[[39]](#cite_note-39)
* 2013: [Willem-Alexander of the Netherlands](/wiki/Willem-Alexander_of_the_Netherlands "Willem-Alexander of the Netherlands"), as Prince of Orange
* 2013: [Queen Máxima of the Netherlands](/wiki/Queen_M%C3%A1xima_of_the_Netherlands "Queen Máxima of the Netherlands"), as Princess of Orange
* 2014: [Tun Pehin Sri Haji Abdul Taib Mahmud](/wiki/Abdul_Taib_Mahmud "Abdul Taib Mahmud"), [Yang di-Pertua Negeri of Sarawak](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertua_Negeri_of_Sarawak "Yang di-Pertua Negeri of Sarawak")[[40]](#cite_note-40)
* 2015: [Joko Widodo](/wiki/Joko_Widodo "Joko Widodo"), [President of Indonesia](/wiki/President_of_Indonesia "President of Indonesia")[[41]](#cite_note-41)
* 2019: [Tunku Azizah Aminah](/wiki/Tunku_Azizah_Aminah_Maimunah_Iskandariah "Tunku Azizah Aminah Maimunah Iskandariah"), [Raja Permaisuri Agong of Malaysia](/wiki/Raja_Permaisuri_Agong "Raja Permaisuri Agong")[[42]](#cite_note-42)
* 2022: [Lee Hsien Loong](/wiki/Lee_Hsien_Loong "Lee Hsien Loong"), [Prime Minister of Singapore](/wiki/Prime_Minister_of_Singapore "Prime Minister of Singapore")[[43]](#cite_note-43)
* 2025: [Vjosa Osmani](/wiki/Vjosa_Osmani "Vjosa Osmani"), [President of Kosovo](/wiki/President_of_Kosovo "President of Kosovo")
* 2025: [Prabowo Subianto](/wiki/Prabowo_Subianto "Prabowo Subianto"), [President of Indonesia](/wiki/President_of_Indonesia "President of Indonesia")[[44]](#cite_note-44)
* [Hosni Mubarak](/wiki/Hosni_Mubarak "Hosni Mubarak"), [President of Egypt](/wiki/President_of_Egypt "President of Egypt")
* [Raja Perempuan Tengku Anis](/wiki/Raja_Perempuan_Tengku_Anis "Raja Perempuan Tengku Anis")
* [Idris Talog Davies](/wiki/Idris_Talog_Davies "Idris Talog Davies")[[45]](#cite_note-:011-45)
